---

## Overview

> Natural language interface for executing system shell commands.

**OS Agent** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0f00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0f00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#452800,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
OS-Agent/
  LICENSE
  README.md
  .cache/
    agent.db
  __pycache__/
    gui.cpython-311.pyc
    modern_gui.cpython-311.pyc
  agent/
    __init__.py
  logs/
  screenshots/
  tests/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `79` |
| **Frameworks** | `Native` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>requests</code>  <code>rich</code>  <code>pillow</code>  <code>pyaudio</code>  <code>pyautogui</code>  <code>edge-tts</code>  <code>SpeechRecognition</code>
</p>
